characters.name: TIINA
characters.description: Väike kollane tihane, sinaka pealaega ja musta kraega. Väikesed säravad pruunid silmad, alati uudishimulik ja rõõmsameelne. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: PEETER
characters.description: Väike pruun rästas, heledama kõhuga, millel on pruunid täpid. Suured mustad silmad, mõtlik ja sõbralik. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: METSASERV
locations.description: A cheerful, sunny forest edge clearing. Lush green grass covers the ground. Tall, slender green trees with fresh green leaves line the background, letting dappled sunlight filter through. A few small colorful spring flowers (like bluebells and white wood anemones) are scattered in the grass. Bright, clear blue sky visible above the trees. A low, mossy tree branch is visible in the foreground for the birds to perch on. Gentle, peaceful atmosphere. Cartoon style.

pages.scene: Tiina, a small yellow titmouse with a bluish cap and black collar, and Peeter, a small brown thrush with a lighter belly and brown spots, are perched together on a low, mossy branch of a tree at the sunny forest edge clearing. They look around with curious and happy expressions. Lush green grass and spring flowers are on the ground below them. The sky is bright blue.

Tiina, a small yellow titmouse, and Peeter, a small brown thrush, are perched together on the same low, mossy branch at the sunny forest edge clearing. Tiina is looking at Peeter with an excited expression, while Peeter is tilting his head slightly as if thinking. They both look eager to do something. Lush green grass and spring flowers are on the ground below them. The sky is bright blue.

Tiina, a small yellow titmouse, and Peeter, a small brown thrush, are perched on the same low, mossy branch at the sunny forest edge clearing. Both birds have their heads tilted, eyes closed slightly, listening intently to the sounds around them. The atmosphere is peaceful and attentive. Lush green grass and spring flowers are on the ground below them. The sky is bright blue.

Tiina, a small yellow titmouse, and Peeter, a small brown thrush, are perched on the same low, mossy branch at the sunny forest edge clearing. They are looking up at the tall, slender trees in the background, which appear to be gently swaying. A light breeze is suggested by their posture. Lush green grass and spring flowers are on the ground below them. The sky is bright blue.

Tiina, a small yellow titmouse, and Peeter, a small brown thrush, are perched on the same low, mossy branch at the sunny forest edge clearing. Both birds look slightly surprised, their heads turned in the direction of a distant sound. Lush green grass and spring flowers are on the ground below them. The sky is bright blue.

Tiina, a small yellow titmouse, is chirping softly with her beak slightly open, trying out a musical note. Peeter, a small brown thrush, is listening intently, perched next to her on the low, mossy branch at the sunny forest edge clearing. They are focused on creating a melody. Lush green grass and spring flowers are on the ground below them. The sky is bright blue.

Tiina, a small yellow titmouse, and Peeter, a small brown thrush, are both singing together, with their beaks open, perched on the low, mossy branch at the sunny forest edge clearing. Musical notes are subtly suggested around them, floating in the air. They are creating a beautiful sound together. Lush green grass and spring flowers are on the ground below them. The sky is bright blue.

Tiina, a small yellow titmouse, and Peeter, a small brown thrush, are still singing together with joyful expressions, perched on the low, mossy branch at the sunny forest edge clearing. Their song fills the air, and musical notes gently float around them, indicating the beauty of their melody. Lush green grass and spring flowers are on the ground below them. The sky is bright blue.

Tiina, a small yellow titmouse, and Peeter, a small brown thrush, are happily singing, still perched on the low, mossy branch at the sunny forest edge clearing. The sun is shining brightly, casting warm light on them. The birds look content as they continue their beautiful song. Lush green grass and spring flowers are on the ground below them. The sky is bright blue.

Tiina, a small yellow titmouse, and Peeter, a small brown thrush, are perched closely together on the low, mossy branch at the sunny forest edge clearing. They are chirping happily and looking at each other with warm, friendly smiles. Their faces show great joy and friendship after their successful singing. Lush green grass and spring flowers are on the ground below them. The sky is bright blue.
